word_list.word: you either die a hero or live long enough to see yourself become the villain

senses.definition: used to suggest that success and power can corrupt even the most virtuous or heroic individuals, leading them to abandon their principles

word_list.word: better a good cow than a cow of a good kind

senses.definition: used to emphasize the value of personal qualities and virtues over one's family background or social status

word_list.word: do right and fear no man
word_list.phonetic_text: du: raɪt ænd fɪr noʊ mæn
word_list.phonetic_am_text: doo rait ānd fir nooo mān
word_list.pronunciation: dˈuː ɹˈaɪt ænd fˈɪɹ nˈoʊ mˈæn

senses.definition: used to suggest that if a person always acts with honesty, integrity, and morality, they have nothing to fear from others
used to imply that  honesty, justice, and integrity in competition or conflict are highly valued and considered precious

examples.x: As a journalist, I believe that fair play is a jewel, and it's important to report the truth without bias or prejudice.

word_list.word: he lives long who lives well
word_list.pronunciation: hiː lˈɪvz lˈɑːŋ hˌuː lˈɪvz wˈɛl

senses.definition: used to emphasize that the quality of one's life is more important than the quantity of years lived, as a good and virtuous life is more fulfilling and leads to a longer and happier life

word_list.word: hear no evil, see no evil, speak no evil
word_list.pronunciation: hˈɪɹ nˈoʊ ˈiːvəl sˈiː nˈoʊ ˈiːvəl spˈiːk nˈoʊ ˈiːvəl

senses.definition: used to encourage people to avoid negativity and harmful behavior toward others, focusing on positivity and refraining from spreading gossip or harmful information

word_list.pronunciation: ðɛɹ ɪz ˈɑːnɚ ˈiːvən ɐmˌʌŋ θˈiːvz

senses.definition: used to suggest that even those with questionable morals may have a sense of honor and loyalty among themselves, highlighting the unexpected bonds that can form between individuals
used to imply that the satisfaction of doing the right thing is a reward in itself and that people should strive to act with honor and integrity in all aspects of life

word_list.word: it is ill waiting for dead men's shoes
word_list.pronunciation: ɪt ɪz ˈɪl wˈeɪɾɪŋ fɔːɹ dˈɛd mˈɛnz ʃˈuːz

senses.definition: used to warn against relying on an inheritance or waiting for someone else's misfortune before pursuing personal goals, encouraging people to take action toward achieving success

word_list.word: a clean conscience makes a soft pillow
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ klˈiːn kˈɑːnʃəns mˌeɪks ɐ sˈɔft pˈɪloʊ

senses.definition: used to suggest that a person who has acted with honesty, integrity, and morality can rest easy and feel at ease with themselves

word_list.word: a clear conscience is a sure card
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ klˈɪɹ kˈɑːnʃəns ɪz ɐ ʃˈʊɹ kˈɑːɹd

senses.definition: used to imply that having a clear conscience, free from guilt or wrongdoing, can be a valuable asset in life

word_list.word: an honest man's pillow is his peace of mind
word_list.pronunciation: ɐn ˈɑːnɪst mˈænz pˈɪloʊ ɪz hɪz pˈiːs ʌv mˈaɪnd

senses.definition: used to suggest that having a clear conscience and living with integrity can bring a sense of security and inner peace
